meta.title: SmartBrew POS — fast at the counter, smart behind it
meta.description: A point of sale for cafes: ring up orders fast, automate stock and sales, keep selling when the internet drops, and let AI forecast demand. Available for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

hero.headline:
You make the coffee.
We handle the rest.
hero.subline: A cafe POS that rings up fast, closes bills cleanly, tracks stock automatically — and never stalls when the Wi-Fi does.

capabilities.title: Close bills in a few taps
capabilities.desc: A sale screen built for the rush — add items, take payment, and close the bill in seconds.

capabilities.title: Take every kind of payment
capabilities.desc: Cash, transfer, card, and PromptPay on one bill, with split payments and instant receipts.

capabilities.title: Never lose track of stock
capabilities.desc: Ingredients deplete by recipe automatically, with low-stock alerts before you run out — no daily counting.

capabilities.title: Let AI order for you
capabilities.desc: Forecast demand and get ingredient-ordering suggestions ahead of time, in Thai, on-device.

capabilities.title: Sell straight through outages
capabilities.desc: Local-first order capture that syncs automatically the moment you're back online — no interruptions.

capabilities.title: Every branch, one screen
capabilities.desc: Roll up sales and stock across all branches, compare, and act from a single dashboard.

quiet.line2: So your shop can be loud.

steps.title: Download and install
steps.desc: Windows, macOS, or Linux — ready in minutes.

steps.title: Add your menu and team
steps.desc: Set up your menu, recipes, and users once.

steps.title: Open up and sell
steps.desc: Sell at the counter, watch sales live, and let AI plan your stock.

pricing.heading: Buy once. Own it forever.
pricing.sub: One payment, no monthly fees, no lock-in.

items.a: Absolutely. It's local-first — sell and record orders even when the internet drops, and everything syncs automatically when you're back.
Windows, macOS, Linux, and touch tablets — designed for easy taps at the counter.
Your data lives mainly on your machine, is encrypted in transit, and we keep personal data to the minimum we need.
None. Pay once and it's yours — no monthly fees, no surprise charges.

cta.heading: Ready to make your counter flow?
cta.sub: Download SmartBrew POS today, or get new features in your inbox first.

newsletter.label: Your email
newsletter.success: Thanks! We'll send you news and new features.

download.errorNote: We can't load the latest release right now — please try again later.

feedback.title: Share your feedback
feedback.subtitle: Found a bug, have an idea, or just want to say hi? Tell us — you can attach a screenshot too.
feedback.imageHint: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF · up to 5MB

footer.tagline: A cafe POS — fast at the counter, smart behind it, and steady offline.
